title: XWiki
description: Open-source advanced enterprise wiki platform for building collaborative web applications, knowledge bases and intranets.
installation: Uses the official xwiki image (Tomcat, postgres variant) on internal port 8080. Deploy with the bundled PostgreSQL add-on; the DB_USER/DB_PASSWORD/DB_DATABASE/DB_HOST env vars point XWiki at the '{{KUBERO_APP_NAME}}-postgresql-rw' Postgres service (rotate the Postgres add-on password after install). On first boot XWiki connects to the empty database, runs the Distribution Wizard to install the default flavor (XWiki Standard), and prompts you to create the admin (superadmin) user and password at the app URL, complete the wizard and set a strong admin password before going to production. The permanent directory (config, extensions, attachments cache, Solr search index) lives under /usr/local/xwiki and is persisted by the xwiki-data volume, no external Solr/Elasticsearch is required since XWiki ships an embedded Solr index there. Increase the app pod size (JVM heap) for larger wikis. The 'stable-postgres-tomcat' tag tracks the latest stable XWiki release, switch to an 'lts-postgres-tomcat' tag for long-term-support builds.
